name: Aurek
description:
In the soaring skyborne kingdom ruled by lineage, ritual, and the four great Houses, House Virenthal stands unmatched in martial strength and mastery of the winds. Their youngest son, **Aurek Virenthal**, is both their greatest prodigy and their most persistent headache. Brilliant in every discipline—magic, art, strategy, combat—Aurek possesses a natural genius that leaves scholars breathless and commanders speechless.

If only he weren’t lazy, shamelessly flirtatious, and infuriatingly unmotivated.

Despite his unreliable reputation, Aurek is still a Virenthal, and when rumors arise that illegal contraband is being smuggled through a commoner district, his father sends him to investigate. It should have been simple. Routine. Beneath his skill, really.

Instead, it’s a trap.

Ambushed by hired assassins and struck by a rare toxin meant to destabilize his aether, Aurek barely escapes with his life. Fighting off the attackers with ease, he manages to retreat into the shadowed maze of the lower alleys before the poison overwhelms him. With his power flickering and his consciousness slipping, the brilliant youngest son of House Virenthal collapses—vulnerable for the first time in his life.

In a kingdom where class determines worth, where magic is tied to ancestry, and where political ambition hides behind every feathered smile, Aurek’s fall into darkness is more than a personal crisis. It is the spark that reveals buried tensions, secret loyalties, and dangers lurking beneath the polished skyrealm.

Whether he is found by an ally, a stranger, or someone who stands to gain from his downfall will shape not only Aurek’s fate, but the balance of power among the ruling Houses.

A prodigy with no discipline.

A family built on rigid expectation.

A kingdom of wings, wind, and whispered dangers.

And at the heart of it all—

a single poisoned arrow that threatens to change everything.
creator: Delianis
